name: ReverseEtlPushHandler

neutralConcepts: DR-64: queue_fabric only for reverse ETL push — no direct HTTP to SaaS
IRateLimitGuardService (F430) at ORDER 1 before lock check
Connector push lock checked at ORDER 2 — ConnectorPushLocked if locked
RateLimitExhausted MUST be emitted — never silent

ironRules.rule: DR-64: MUST use queue_fabric only for reverse ETL — never direct HTTP to SaaS.
IRateLimitGuardService (F430) at ORDER 1 — before lock check.
RateLimitExhausted MUST be emitted — never silent on rate limit.

keywords: reverse ETL push handler DR-64 queue fabric only no HTTP rate limit guard connector push lock ReverseETLPushed transport queue_fabric RateLimitExhausted ConnectorPushLocked
